title: Intensely Malty Malaysian Pistachio Curry
description: A rich and comforting vegetarian Malaysian curry featuring pistachio and a malty flavor, perfect for a sick day, served en croute in a terracotta dish. The cheese-pull effect adds to the dish's appeal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the onion until softened.
Add the garlic and curry powder to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the pistachio meal, malt extract, and coconut milk, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season the curry with salt to taste.
Transfer the curry to a terracotta dish and top with the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Bake the curry in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the curry en croute, with the cheese pull intact.
